scores.correctness_notes: Response correctly includes all three required sections (service with env vars, HTTP health check, log target) with valid YAML structure. However, it omits the key `on-check-failure` mapping that links the check to the service for automated restart — a highlighted feature in the gold standard. The response uses `on-success`/`on-failure` restart policies instead, which are valid but don't demonstrate check-to-service integration.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — `on-success`, `on-failure`, `backoff-delay`, `backoff-factor`, `backoff-limit` are all real Pebble service fields. All parameters are valid.
